metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_4674
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig. 2: Overexpression of EXO70 increases dendritic branching (infection at DIV0, analysis at DIV15, MAP staining)
Fig. 3: EXO70 shRNA rescues dendritic branching (infection at DIV0, analysis at DIV15, MAP staining): only 1 shRNA tested, no rescue with shRNA-resistant EXO70
Fig. 7: Overexpression increases, shRNA decreases number of Piccolo and Shank-positive synapses
Fig. 8: Overexpression increases, shRNA decreases SV recycling measured with FM4-64 dye
Fig. 9: Exo70 overexpression promotes spine maturation. Experimental description: M&M: Hippocampal cultures were prepared using a modified Banker's culture protocol. Briefly, hippocampi were dissected from embryonic Sprague-Dawley rats (E18).
